company_context: Bitbucket | Git solution for teams using Jira Code and CI/CD, powered by AI and the Atlassian platform Accelerate software delivery from idea to code to production, with a seamless connection to Jira and AI beyond code creation Try it now Watch demo AI throughout the SDLC Reduce cycle times across the development lifecycle with AI-powered search, code review, pipeline triage, and even Jira updates. Extensible and all-in-one Streamline software development with a complete platform for issue tracking, source code, container registries, and CI/CD pipelines. Integrate your other tools as you need them. Platform-wide standards Be confident in your software delivery with enforced standards, policies, and compliance checks across all code and CI/CD. AI that provides context to code, not just vibes Friction slowing you down? Bitbucket helps you find your flow and stay there, with code and CI/CD connected to Jira and powered by AI Migrating to the cloud? Bitbucket Cloud supercharges code and CI/CD with AI that knows your team, code base, feature requirements, and more as part of the Atlassian Cloud platform, so no infrastructure is required. Get in touch 15 million developers build on Bitbucket 1/4 "The Jira/Bitbucket integration has transformed the way our software teams are able to communicate, work together, and deploy code. It's been an absolute game changer for us." Nate Van Dusen, Engineering Program Management Director Trulia 2/4 "With the integration, it’s possible to link each line of changed code back to a Jira work item, to understand not only what was changed, but why" Scott Carpenter, Global Cloud Architect Fugro 3/4 "Jira and Bitbucket are linked to show details and where the change is in production. It’s traceable, so they know what we’re doing and when we’re deploying." Kyle Gengler, Senior DevOps Engineer Nextiva 4/4 "We've gone from one big-bang release every month to 10-20 production deployments per day. We also reduced the average development cycle time from 5.8 days to 2.9 days and the standard deviation from 19.8 days to 3.5 days." Roman Bugaev, CTO Flo ← → Platform-wide AI beyond code generation Atlassian supercharges workflows with AI beyond code generation, accelerating development throughout the software lifecycle. Introducing Rovo Dev Reduce friction and automate busywork across software development with agentic AI for developers. Generate code plans, turn Jira items into code, review code and more. Learn about Rovo Dev AI where you work Spend more time coding with AI that knows your codebase in Bitbucket, work items in Jira, documentation in Confluence, and more, accessible anywhere, even in the CLI . Learn more AI-powered teams Contribute to any codebase on day one. With Rovo and Bitbucket, you and your team are always up to speed on all discussions, documentation, even work items statuses. conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps companies like yours streamline their software delivery. I came across your company and saw that you're using Bitbucket and Jira. Can you tell me a little bit about your current workflow and how you're handling data processing?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Ah, yes. We're pretty happy with our current setup. We've got Bitbucket and Jira integrated, and it's working well for us. What makes you think we need a data processing solution like DeepData AI?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Well, from what I've seen, many companies using Bitbucket and Jira are still struggling with data processing and analysis. Our solution can help you automate a lot of the manual tasks and provide more insights into your data. We've had great success with similar companies in the past. Would you be open to exploring how DeepData AI can help?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I'm not sure. We've recently signed a contract with a competitor, Datapulse, and we're locked in for at least the next two years. I'm not sure we can consider switching to a new solution right now. Plus, I'm concerned about the cost of integrating a new system with our existing tools.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand your concerns about the contract, but I'd like to discuss how DeepData AI can provide more value than Datapulse. We've had companies switch to us from competitors and see significant improvements in their data processing efficiency. As for integration, we have a team that can help with that and ensure a seamless transition. Can I schedule a demo to show you what we can do?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the offer, but I'm not sure it's worth the investment of our time. We're in the middle of a big project right now, and I don't want to disrupt our workflow. Additionally, I'm not convinced that DeepData AI can provide enough benefits to justify the cost. Can you tell me more about your pricing model and how it compares to what we're paying Datapulse?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Our pricing model is based on the amount of data being processed, and we offer tiered pricing to fit different company sizes. I can send over some information on our pricing, but I'd like to discuss how we can tailor a solution to fit your specific needs. Would you be willing to consider a pilot project to test out DeepData AI and see the benefits for yourself?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Alex, I appreciate your persistence, but I think we're going to have to pass on DeepData AI. We're committed to our contract with Datapulse, and I don't see a compelling reason to switch. Our current solution is working well enough for us, and I don't want to introduce any unnecessary risk or disruption to our workflow. Thank you for your time, but I think we'll have to decline your offer.

analysis.raw:
Score: 2
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Competitors
Feedback: The seller should have more aggressively addressed the buyer's existing contract with a competitor and provided a clearer value proposition to overcome the switching costs and risks. Sentiment: Negative

parsed.feedback: The seller should have more aggressively addressed the buyer's existing contract with a competitor and provided a clearer value proposition to overcome the switching costs and risks. Sentiment: Negative
